name: Australian Grilled Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. For the fish steaks, they should be 8-10 ounces and about 1-inch thick each. Use Swordfish, Halibut, or Salmon steaks.
2. In a bowl, combine the lime juice, 2 tablespoons oil, grated ginger, cayenne pepper, and enough freshly ground black pepper to suit your taste.
3. Marinate the fish in the marinade for 45-60 minutes, turning the steaks 2-3 times.
4. Prepare the grill with white coals and brush the cooking grate with the remaining tablespoon of oil.
5. Grill the fish, brushing several times with the marinade until cooked through and opaque in the center. Turn the fish after about 4-5 minutes. Total grilling time will depend on your grill and the heat of the coals.
